body.title: Console must show tier routing, habit match, reply status in real time
body.result: Added real-time console prints: coherence gate, habit result preview, LLM fallthrough reason, reply status+tier+elapsed.
body.description: Akien has asked repeatedly. During turn processing, console should show: which tier routed, which habit matched (or none), whether LLM is being called, reply preview. Currently only the post-turn dashboard box shows. Need real-time status during processing.
